# ReactTeacher

> Free React interview prep: coding challenges, flashcards, patterns, and system design guides.

- Site: https://reactteacher.vercel.app
- Get started: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/get-started
- Challenges: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/challenges
- Flashcards: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/flashcards
- Patterns: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/react-patterns
- System design: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/system-design
- FAQ: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/faq
- About: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/about
- Blog: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/blog
- Sitemap: https://reactteacher.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

Also see: PythonTeacher (pythonprep.vercel.app), NodeTeacher (nodeprep.vercel.app), ReactTeacher (reactteacher.vercel.app).
